tooltip.endermanoverhaul.ancient_pearl: Summons a friendly enderman to fight for you
tooltip.endermanoverhaul.bubble_pearl: Accurate Ender Pearl with no gravity
tooltip.endermanoverhaul.corrupted_pearl: Teleports targets to a random location
tooltip.endermanoverhaul.hood: Allows you to look at endermen without angering them
tooltip.endermanoverhaul.soul_pearl_1: Shift-right click to bind an entity
tooltip.endermanoverhaul.soul_pearl_2: Teleports the bound entity to the target location
